01
Sound before grammar

Train your ear before your mouth. Every brain acquires language through sound first — starting Day 1, not page 200.

02
Spanish has 5 vowels. English has 15.

Once your ear is calibrated, the fog lifts. Words stick without memorization. This is the insight that changes everything.

03
The Day 30 Promise

A real, unrehearsed conversation by Day 30. Guaranteed — or Jazmín keeps working with you until it happens.

"I could conjugate verbs but couldn't order coffee. Six weeks with Jazmín and I was having real conversations for the first time."
— Frank · Co-creator & Founding Student
